quotes.text: A bug becomes a feature the moment a customer depends on it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The customer is always right about the problem. They're almost always wrong about the solution.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best business advice is free: talk to your customers. The worst business advice is expensive: hire a consultant who's never done what you're doing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first customer is worth more than your next thousand. Treat them that way.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to grow is to make your current customers successful. Happy customers bring new customers.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your best customers aren't the ones who pay the most. They're the ones who stay the longest and tell others.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your most powerful marketing asset is a customer who genuinely loves what you built.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best SaaS teams are the ones where engineers talk to customers monthly. Not yearly. Monthly.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first paying customer is worth more than your next 100 signups. Treat them like royalty.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your happiest customers are your best marketing channel. Make them happy.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to check in with a customer is when things are going well. Not just when they're not.
quotes.author: based
